# AskMukthiGuru

> AI-guided spiritual conversations and meditations rooted in the teachings of Sri Preethaji, Sri Krishnaji, Sadhguru, Amma Bhagavan, and ISKCON. Free, private, always available.

AskMukthiGuru is a privacy-first spiritual companion platform. Users chat with a conversational AI guru, practice guided meditations (Soul Sync, Serene Mind, Beautiful State, Daily Reflection), explore a knowledge graph of spiritual concepts, and receive daily teachings. Conversations are stored per authenticated user; anonymous use falls back to local storage.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, guru introductions, featured practices, and daily teaching feed.
- [Chat](/chat): Conversational AI guru. Select a teacher (Preethaji, Krishnaji, Sadhguru, Amma Bhagavan, ISKCON) and ask spiritual questions.
- [Practices](/practices): Catalog of guided meditations and contemplative practices.
- [Practices: Soul Sync](/practices/soul-sync): 15–20 min contemplative practice for inner connection.
- [Practices: Serene Mind](/practices/serene-mind): 3-minute breathing reset with flame visualization.
- [Practices: Beautiful State](/practices/beautiful-state): 10–15 min heart-opening loving-kindness practice.
- [Practices: Daily Reflection](/practices/daily-reflection): 5–10 min evening review with gratitude.
- [Knowledge Graph](/knowledge-graph): Interactive visualization of spiritual concepts and their relationships.
- [Study Notebook](/notebooks): Save, organize, and review your conversation insights and teachings.
- [Guides: Spirit Guides](/guides/spirit-guides): Explore the concept of spirit guides and inner wisdom.
- [Profile](/profile): Manage account, preferences, and conversation history.
- [Sign In](/auth): Email/password and Google OAuth sign-in.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Data handling, conversation privacy, and meditation data policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of use, AI disclosure, and acceptable use.

## Admin Pages

- [Admin Dashboard](/admin): Ingestion queue, RAG flow monitoring, query analysis, quality metrics, retrieval evaluation, telemetry, alerts, and settings.
- [Admin: Concept Graph](/admin/concept-graph): Visual management of knowledge graph entities, relationships, and ontology.
- [Admin: Ingestion](/admin/ingestion): Document ingestion pipeline management and status.
- [Admin: RAG Flow](/admin/rag-flow): End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation pipeline monitoring.

## API

- [API Docs](/api/docs): Interactive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for the FastAPI backend.
- [API Health](/api/health): Backend health check endpoint.
- [Chat](/api/chat): POST to send messages, POST /chat/stream for SSE streaming responses.
- [Auth](/api/auth): POST /register, /token (login), OAuth callbacks, password reset.
- [Memory](/api/memory): GET/POST conversation episodes, core memory, summaries, and relevant context retrieval.
- [Knowledge Graph](/api/kg): SPARQL query endpoint, subgraph retrieval, concept search.
- [Speech](/api/speech): POST /speech/stt (speech-to-text), POST /speech/tts (text-to-speech), POST /translate.
- [Teachings](/api/teachings): Daily teachings feed, teaching tips, and regeneration.
- [Profile](/api/profile): GET/PUT user profile data.
- [Notebooks](/api/notebooks): CRUD for study notebooks and notebook items.
- [Feedback](/feedback): POST user feedback, GET history and feedback-derived lessons.
- [Ingestion](/api/ingest): POST document ingestion, GET ingestion status.
- [Jobs](/api/jobs): Background job status tracking.
- [Metrics](/api/metrics/cache): Cache performance metrics.
- [Admin](/api/admin): Admin-only operations including query management, quality evaluation, telemetry, alerts, and settings.

## Content & Policies

- **Spiritual Teachers**: The platform draws from teachings of Sri Preethaji, Sri Krishnaji, Sadhguru, Amma Bhagavan, and ISKCON. Each conversation can be grounded in a specific teacher's perspective.
- **AI Disclosure**: All responses are generated by a large language model. Content is for spiritual exploration and should not replace professional medical, psychological, or legal advice.
- **Privacy**: Conversations are private and encrypted. Anonymous users' data is stored locally. Authenticated users' data is stored securely server-side.
- **Terms**: Users must be 13+. Commercial scraping is prohibited. The service may refuse content that promotes harm, violence, or illegal activity.
- **Knowledge Graph**: The platform maintains a Neo4j-backed knowledge graph of spiritual concepts, their relationships, and teacher-specific interpretations. This graph powers context-aware responses and is browsable via the frontend knowledge graph page.
- **Retrieval**: A RAG pipeline (Qdrant vector store + hybrid search) retrieves relevant teachings from the ingested corpus before generating responses.
